chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Today we are going to talk about multi level inheritance

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: So lets go to the computer screen and see what is multi level inheritance

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Lets get started

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Now we are going to talk about multi level inheritance

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Multi level inheritance is a type of inheritance in object oriented programming

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Where a derived class inherits from another derived class

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: For example, a class was made from a derived class

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: And another class was made from another derived class

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Lets say that grandfather is the father of grandfather

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: And father's son is the son of father

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: So grandfather's grandson is the father of grandfather

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: For example, class A to B and class B to C

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: So class C is the grandson of class A

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: You can understand it like this

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: It will be simple for you to understand

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Multi level inheritance allows you to build a hierarchy of classes

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Where one class builds upon another

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Leading to a more specialized class

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: I will give you a very classic example

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Lets say there is a human

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Human has basic functions like eating

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: And what else does the human do

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: And many more things

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Now the human will be an employee

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Now you can make an employee from him

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: And add more things to it

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Make a programmer from an employee

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: So the programmer is a type of employee

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Which has all the functions of a basic employee

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Like employee takes a paycheck

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: And he does his work

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: And along with that

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: There are many other things that all employees do

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Like employees go on lunch break

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Employees take their holidays

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Employees take a Sunday holiday

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: But there are some things that only the programmer does

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: He is a type of employee

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: In that we need all the methods of the employee

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: And on top of that we need some other methods

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: So I will show you a diagram

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: You will have some clarity

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: I got a good example here

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: I got a very good image here

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: A to B is simple inheritance

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: The most popular inheritance

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Which we studied in the name of single inheritance

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Then we studied multiple inheritance

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: What happens in multiple inheritance

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: More than one class becomes a new class

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: That is multiple inheritance

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: One child is from one class

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Then multi-level inheritance

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Then hierarchical inheritance

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: I will tell you this in code

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: There is a base class and a derived class 1

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: And we made derived class 2

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: In this example there is a derived class 1

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: And derived class 2

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Derived class 2 is made from derived class 1

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: And derived class 2 has access to all the attributes

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: And methods of derived class 1 and base class

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: You must have understood this

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Now see here

chunks.text: Name will be Tommy

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: This is the example of multi-level inheritance

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: Another important aspect of multi-level inheritance is that it allows you to reuse code

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: And avoid repeating the same logic multiple times

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: It reduces your repeatability

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: You don't have to write one code 10 times

chunks.title: Multilevel Inheritance in Python
chunks.text: You can use your previous code

text: Today we are going to talk about multi level inheritance So lets go to the computer screen and see what is multi level inheritance Lets get started Now we are going to talk about multi level inheritance Multi level inheritance is a type of inheritance in object oriented programming Where a derived class inherits from another derived class For example, a class was made from a derived class And another class was made from another derived class Lets say that grandfather is the father of grandfather And father's son is the son of father So grandfather's grandson is the father of grandfather For example, class A to B and class B to C So class C is the grandson of class A You can understand it like this It will be simple for you to understand Multi level inheritance allows you to build a hierarchy of classes Where one class builds upon another Leading to a more specialized class I will give you a very classic example Lets say there is a human Human has basic functions like eating And what else does the human do And many more things Now the human will be an employee Now you can make an employee from him And add more things to it Make a programmer from an employee So the programmer is a type of employee Which has all the functions of a basic employee Like employee takes a paycheck And he does his work And along with that There are many other things that all employees do Like employees go on lunch break Employees take their holidays Employees take a Sunday holiday But there are some things that only the programmer does He is a type of employee In that we need all the methods of the employee And on top of that we need some other methods So I will show you a diagram You will have some clarity I got a good example here I got a very good image here A to B is simple inheritance The most popular inheritance Which we studied in the name of single inheritance Then we studied multiple inheritance What happens in multiple inheritance More than one class becomes a new class That is multiple inheritance One child is from one class Then multi-level inheritance Then hierarchical inheritance I will tell you this in code There is a base class and a derived class 1 And we made derived class 2 In this example there is a derived class 1 And derived class 2 Derived class 2 is made from derived class 1 And derived class 2 has access to all the attributes And methods of derived class 1 and base class You must have understood this Now see here I will copy this example I will run the console So that you have clarity I have not made any method There is an animal Then we have a dog In this show details method has been overwritten And finally in golden retriever Has been changed You can see the method here Here we have said that parent's show details Call and then now I will call show details I will call this method And when I will call show details Dog's show details will run Dog's class is here I have to call animal's show details It will show name species Then it will come back Now I will print breed But the dog's show details Was coming from here I hope you understood You can see it If you didn't understand Now see We have said call show details Means dog Would I have printed these four lines And what is the reason, tell me in the comments And once again I want to tell you If I print golden retriever's MRO Method resolution order I can print it like this It will tell me where it will go I have done wrong spelling Retriever Retriever I have done golden So don't do this kind of spelling mistakes You can see, whatever method it is It will find in golden retriever, dog, animal It will find in dog because golden retriever is made from dog If it didn't find any method in dog It will find in animal And there can be any long chain So this way
